vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements.role: Base plate with mounting holes, leveling, and cable entry

risk.desc: Potential for thermal expansion causing misalignment in the arm
risk.mit: Implement thermal expansion joints or use materials with similar thermal expansion coefficients

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to inadequate strain relief
risk.mit: Ensure all cable exits have strain relief features and routing respects minimum bend radius

risk.desc: Risk of over-torqueing fasteners leading to joint failure
risk.mit: Implement torque control mechanisms and provide clear torque specifications

risk.desc: Risk of improper assembly sequence leading to misalignment
risk.mit: Provide detailed assembly sequence with tool, torque, and datum per step

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient structural integrity due to thin wall sections
risk.mit: Increase wall thickness in critical areas or use thicker materials

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

physics_paths.path: Load is transferred through the wrist roll axis to the shoulder module.
Power and signal flow through the slip ring from the shoulder module to the wrist module.
Heat from the welding cell is dissipated through the heat shield of the forearm.
Motion is transferred from the actuator to the wrist roll axis.
Air pressure is applied to the cable spine to maintain cable integrity.
Electrical signals and data are transmitted from the control system to the wrist module.
Maintenance personnel access the service access port for inspection and maintenance.

integration_opportunities.opportunity: Integrate bearing seat with shoulder for improved load distribution.
Optimize snap fit for faster assembly and disassembly.
Use high-temperature resistant materials for slip ring in welding cell environments.
Design service access port for easy maintenance and inspection.

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces and axis rings
manufacturing_strategy.support: Vertical orientation for CNC milling, horizontal for LPBF
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Coordinate measuring machine (CMM) for dimensional accuracy

verification_focus.test: Torque test to ensure preload and joint integrity
Continuous rotation test to verify joint travel range and cycle life
Electrical and signal integrity test under thermal stress

Power lines run from the driver_bay to the power_channel, ensuring sufficient power delivery.
Heat from the driver_bay is dissipated through the thermal_inspection_window for monitoring and cooling.
Service access to the driver_bay is provided through the service_cover for maintenance and inspection.
The ground_point provides a structural connection and grounding for the driver_bay_shell.

verification_focus.description: Ensure signal lines are routed cleanly without interference.
Verify heat dissipation through the thermal_inspection_window.
Check structural integrity and grounding of the driver_bay_shell.
Validate assembly order and mating interfaces.
